task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened the lab preparation request file to identify the targets.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window displaying the contents of '~/Documents/lab_prep_request.txt'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent captured a vibrant sky view for the target carbon stars.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Planetarium software (like KStars) showing the sky map centered on one of the target stars (R_Leporis, T_Lyrae, V_Aquilae, or W_Orionis), or an image viewer displaying a saved screenshot of the sky view.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent configured the camera for 45-second exposures using B and R filters.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Camera capture interface (e.g., Ekos) showing the exposure time set to '45' (seconds) and the filter set to 'B' or 'R' (or slots 3/4).

task_completion.description: Verify the captured images are saved in the correct directory structure.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager or terminal showing subdirectories (e.g., named after the stars) inside '/home/ga/Images/carbon_lab/' containing the captured image files (.fits or similar).

task_completion.description: Verify the agent generated the required CSV summary report.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A spreadsheet or text editor displaying 'lab_summary.csv' (located in ~/Documents/) containing rows for the 4 target stars, noting the B and R filters and 45s exposures.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used actual astronomy/observatory software to perform the observations.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the GUI of KStars/Ekos being interacted with to capture images, rather than terminal commands mocking the output.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use terminal commands to fake the image files.
integrity.visual_evidence: The file manager should show realistic file sizes for captured images (e.g., FITS files), and terminal history should not show commands like 'touch /home/ga/Images/carbon_lab/...' to bypass actual capture.

integrity.description: Verify the CSV summary was created based on actual observations.
integrity.visual_evidence: The CSV file creation or editing should appear in later screenshots, after the camera capture sequences in Ekos are shown, indicating it summarizes real work.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Targets: R_Leporis, T_Lyrae, V_Aquilae, W_Orionis. Required filters: B and R (slots 3 and 4). Exposure time: 45 seconds. Base directory for images: /home/ga/Images/carbon_lab/. Summary CSV path: /home/ga/Documents/lab_summary.csv.
